things.name: Uffizi Gallery
things.description: One of the world's great art museums with Botticelli's Birth of Venus and hundreds of Renaissance masterpieces

things.name: Florence Cathedral (Duomo) & Brunelleschi's Dome
things.description: Magnificent Gothic cathedral with Brunelleschi's revolutionary self-supporting dome — climb for city views

things.name: Galleria dell'Accademia & David
things.description: Michelangelo's magnificent 5.17-metre marble David — arguably the world's most famous sculpture

things.name: Ponte Vecchio
things.description: Medieval bridge lined with jewellers' workshops — the only Florentine bridge spared by the Nazis in 1944

things.name: Pitti Palace & Boboli Gardens
things.description: Vast Renaissance palace with royal apartments, costume museum and terraced Italian formal gardens

things.name: Piazzale Michelangelo
things.description: The terrace with the most celebrated panoramic view of Florence and the Arno — golden hour must-see

things.name: Santa Croce Basilica
things.description: Magnificent Gothic basilica housing tombs of Michelangelo, Galileo, Machiavelli and Dante

things.name: Bargello Museum
things.description: Italy's finest sculpture museum in a medieval palazzo with works by Donatello, Michelangelo and Cellini

things.name: Oltrarno District Food Tour
things.description: The artisan neighbourhood across the Arno — hole-in-the-wall trattorias, workshop studios and Negroni bars

things.name: Chianti Wine Region Day Trip
things.description: Drive through rolling vine-covered hills to visit Greve in Chianti and Panzano for wine tasting
